finding: Only one orientation branch is active, but selecting and transposing a canonical 30x30 mask with ordinary ONNX nodes costs back the memory saved by sharing the branches.
rejected_small_edit: Sharing the post-orientation index pipeline saves about 1296 bytes but cannot approach the greater-than-one-point target once dynamic output orientation is restored.
next_architecture: Compile orientation selection and input overlay into a terminal expression so the canonical mask is not materialized in direct, transposed, and selected forms.
